@ sub-cancel
@@ sub-cancel-double-prod:
((12 + 12) * (13 - 12))
((13 - 12) * (12 + 12))

@@ sub-cancel-double-div:
((12 + 12) / (13 - 12))

@@ sub-cancel-single-prod:
(12 - (12 * (12 - 13)))
(12 - ((12 - 13) * 12))
(12 + (12 * (13 - 12)))
((12 * (13 - 12)) + 12)
(12 + ((13 - 12) * 12))
(((13 - 12) * 12) + 12)

@@ sub-cancel-single-div:
(12 - (12 / (12 - 13)))
(12 + (12 / (13 - 12)))
((12 / (13 - 12)) + 12)

@ div-cancel:
((12 - (12 / 12)) + 13)
(12 - ((12 / 12) - 13))
((12 + 13) - (12 / 12))
(12 + (13 - (12 / 12)))
((13 + 12) - (12 / 12))
((13 - (12 / 12)) + 12)
(13 - ((12 / 12) - 12))
(13 + (12 - (12 / 12)))
